title: Studio – Curated Design Studio
metaDescription: A London-based interior design studio shaping calm, tactile, and quietly confident interiors — working across the UK and on selected international projects.
introText: Every interior begins with how it will be used day to day: the routines, the circulation, and the way light changes across a space. From there, we build a material language that feels calm, tactile, and quietly confident.
workParagraphs: Clean lines, warm proportions, and details that hold up at close range — joinery, hardware, finishes, and the way materials meet.
Rather than chasing trends, the focus is on layouts that genuinely work, robust materials, and a palette that can evolve with your life or brand.
processNote: Throughout, you'll be closely involved — kept close to the decisions that matter without being buried in the ones that don't — with direct, responsive contact from first sketch to final install.

processSteps.label: Brief & concept
processSteps.head: Listening, then sketching.
processSteps.text: We define needs, constraints, and priorities, then develop the initial concept with layouts and mood direction.

processSteps.label: Design development
processSteps.head: Resolving the room.
processSteps.text: We refine plans, finishes, lighting, and joinery detail, aligning the design intent with budget realities.

processSteps.label: Delivery & styling
processSteps.head: Bringing the space to life.
processSteps.text: We coordinate with contractors and suppliers as needed, then complete the space with furniture, art, and styling.

locationsText: Based in London, working across the UK and on selected international projects. Collaborations include architects, developers, and private clients on both new-build and refurbishment schemes.
